name: Broccoli Shrimp Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces shredded Monterey jack cheese, (1 cup)
1 pound frozen broccoli, cooked and drained
1 pound shelled deveined cooked medium shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagne noodles to desired doneness as directed on package; drain. Rinse with hot water.
2. Meanwhile, melt margarine in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Stir in flour, onions, salt, dry mustard, thyme and ground red pepper. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly. Cook and stir until mixture is bubbly and thickened. Remove from heat. Add Monterey jack cheese; stir until melted.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees. In an ungreased 13x9-inch (3-quart) baking dish, layer 1/2 cup sauce, 3 noodles, all of the broccoli, 1/2 cup of the Cheddar cheese and 1 cup sauce. Top with remaining noodles, all of the shrimp, 1 cup of the Cheddar cheese, the remaining sauce and the remaining cheese.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
